key_insights.insight: It's crucial to have aligned visions and passions in business partnerships for long-term success.
key_insights.quote: My partner and I at the time had such different wants, such different, you know, envisionments for our career in the future. And that is so OK. But I think the issue is like if you have the ability to sit down before you begin, which we didn't really have.

key_insights.insight: You should envision success early on and imagine your contracts when someone offers you a large sum of money.
key_insights.quote: Imagine the day when someone comes along and offers you 100 million,how are your contracts?

key_insights.insight: People pleasing can lead to unhealthy compromises and sacrificing one's own well-being for external validation, especially in a demanding field.
key_insights.quote: There were so many things I was doing to appease people around me to keep the show going. That was so unhealthy that now I have in hindsight, I'm like, what was I doing?

key_insights.insight: It is okay to leave a situation if you're compromising your morals and mental health, it's not worth it.
key_insights.quote: But if you are compromising your morals and your mental health and at one point your sanity, like it ain't worth it.

key_insights.insight: Trauma from early adverse experiences doesn't necessarily disappear with success, but remains and can impact one's adult life.
key_insights.quote: When we reach the moment of success or whatever when our circumstances change the trauma goes out the door with it and I I've come to learn from doing this that it stays

key_insights.insight: Content creation and having a creative outlet can be a lifeline during difficult times, fostering confidence and purpose.
key_insights.quote: Creating content was like the one thing that kept me going and like happy. And I was able to find my purpose because school was like just so awful for me.

key_insights.insight: Therapy can be transformative only when one is truly honest and willing to confront their insecurities and past traumas.
key_insights.quote: I know in order to actuallyhave change within myself and for this to work, I have to be honest.

key_insights.insight: Genuine relationships with an audience, built on trust and vulnerability, can lead to remarkable success and create a strong community.
key_insights.quote: I don't think that anyone has the relationship they have with their audience the way that I do.

actionable_advice.advice: Envision your business becoming as big as possible early on to be prepared for the challenges and opportunities that come with success.
actionable_advice.how_to: Before starting, pretend your business is about to become Apple, consider all aspects such as your contracts and your business partners and how they align with your vision.

actionable_advice.advice: Define what you want and have conversations with different people for guidance, but don't be afraid to ask people for help.
actionable_advice.how_to: Make a compass of what you want and have open conversations with people to allow them to ask questions that you wouldn't have been able to think about.

actionable_advice.advice: Set boundaries and address toxicity in your life to prevent it from hindering your happiness.
actionable_advice.how_to: Identify what is negatively impacting your happiness, understand where your boundaries lie, communicate effectively, and end toxic relationships gracefully.

memorable_stories: Alex's story of watching her father produce sports television sparked her passion for media production.
Alex recounts the experience of being bullied in school and the dark thoughts she had, highlighting the importance of addressing those issues.
Alex's experience of how fans tell her about sexual abuse and how she got them out of certain situations.
Alex describes remaking The Devil Wears Prada with her soccer friends to ignite her confidence
contrarian_claims: The more "wild shit" you say, the bigger you can get but can eventually lead to the downfall.
It's okay to 'fake it till you make it' to demand what you deserve.
People think therapy is like, sit down and tell your secrets, but it is so awkward at first.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - Alex Cooper: The World's No.1 Female Podcaster Finally Opens Up! (Call Her Daddy)
